description_long: This minivan features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly black body accented by large, continuous blue-tinted windows along both sides. The roof is equipped with two prominent, elongated glass panels, possibly for skylights or solar panels, giving the vehicle a modern and airy appearance. The front and rear ends are nearly vertical, with wide, dark-tinted windshields and minimalistic detailing, emphasizing a streamlined, boxy silhouette. The wheels are simple, circular, and white-rimmed, partially recessed into the body for a smooth profile. The side windows are expansive, running almost the full length of the vehicle, suggesting a spacious and well-lit interior. The overall aesthetic is clean and minimal, with subtle turquoise highlights around the edges and lighting elements.
description: A sleek, black minivan with large blue-tinted windows, glass roof panels, and minimalistic, futuristic styling. The design features expansive side windows and subtle turquoise accents.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wide, dark windshield, turquoise highlights, and the start of the glass roof panels.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the blue-tinted windows, two glass roof panels, and simple white-rimmed wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a vertical back window, turquoise accents, and the continuation of the glass roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, with large blue-tinted windows and white-rimmed wheels visible.
attribute_window_configuration: Large, continuous blue-tinted side windows; wide front and rear windshields; two elongated glass roof panels.
